verses.1: For the music director; with stringed instruments. A Psalm. A Song. God be gracious to us and bless us, And cause His face to shine upon us— Selah
verses.2: That Your way may be known on the earth, Your salvation among all nations.
verses.3: May the peoples praise You, God; May all the peoples praise You.
verses.4: May the nations be glad and sing for joy; For You will judge the peoples with fairness And guide the nations on the earth. Selah
verses.5: May the peoples praise You, God; May all the peoples praise You.
verses.6: The earth has yielded its produce; God, our God, blesses us.
verses.7: God blesses us, So that all the ends of the earth may fear Him.
